Class Tester

java.lang.Object
classes.Tester
public class Tester extends Object
Tester class serves as the entry point of the Visa Office System. It provides a console-based menu interface for three types of users: Admin, Officer, and Applicant. The class allows users to interact with the system by performing operations such as managing officers, processing applications, and creating visa requests.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Ayham
